elements.title: progress_activity Antigravity Integration Code Analysis now

elements.value: Google Antigravity IDE: Agent-First Development Platform

Google Antigravity is an agent-centric development environment built on a forked version of Visual Studio Code. It features autonomous AI agents powered by Gemini 3 that can plan, write, test, and validate code. This KI covers its core architecture, dual-interface design, remote SSH integration, and
Helldyinger Systems: Combat, Physics, and Stratagems

The definitive reference for Helldyinger's combat systems, physical interactions, and stratagem support. Documents the Weapon Strategy pattern (IWeaponBehavior), projectile pool architecture, and consolidated physics-driven entity interactions (explodeAt). Includes the complete overhaul of the strat
InstantReality: Gemini Robotics Server Analysis & Web UI Implementation

Full implementation blueprint for the InstantReality Server and Gemini Robotics ecosystem. Key components include a unified Server v2 architecture with hybrid transport (WebRTC/REST Polling) and a dual-phase robotics workflow. Recent updates confirmed the feasibility of web-based vertex calibration

This Knowledge Item covers the integration of Google NotebookLM into the robotics research process.
